  • ECUs

4RD_SUV_V1.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 753
Recv ID: 773
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 23
Func Name: 4WS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "A32",
    "soft": "2500",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]
